positive: A majestic, stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) formed entirely from glowing, bioluminescent constellations and nebula gas. The fox should be centered, in a dynamic, graceful pose, emitting vibrant streaks of sapphire blue, deep violet, and shimmering gold light. Its tail should trail ethereal, geometric stardust patterns. The background is a deep, inky void with minimal abstract cosmic dust, providing maximum contrast for the fox's silhouette. Style: Clean line art meets cosmic watercolor, high-contrast graphic design, tattoo flash style, suitable for apparel print. Use strong rim lighting to define edges and give a glowing effect. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and central, focusing on clear, uninterrupted lines and bold color zones.
negative: blurry, artifact, lowres, text, signature, watermark, logo, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, messy, photo, realistic, photographic, grayscale, monochrome
